verdict_reason: Removes duplicated CertificateLoader unit tests from the IT (behaviour remains covered, more thoroughly, by the pre-existing CertificateLoaderTest) leaving a correct SSLContext wiring check; only a Minor test-method naming-convention deviation.

todos.issue: Renamed test method customSslContext_isTlsAndWiredBySpring drops the project's subject_shouldDoWhat naming convention (old name customSslContext_shouldBeConfigured conformed)
todos.fix: Rename to customSslContext_shouldBeTlsAndWiredBySpring to match the subject_shouldDoWhat convention
